event_notes:
7:30 pm. August COC business meeting (basement meeting room).

Coming events (June/July 1979 issue): 7:00 pm newcomer discussion; 7:30 pm meeting; followed by an orienteering slide show by Mike Fiedler.

Schedule update: 7:00–7:30 newcomers' intro to orienteering; meeting starts 7:30pm and followed by slide show by Mike Fiedler.
